---
title: "Teaching"
description: | 
  Welcome to my personal teaching page! Here, you will find a curated collection of educational resources and insights aimed at empowering learners in their academic journey. Explore a range of engaging topics, tutorials, and practical exercises designed to enhance your understanding and ignite a passion for learning. Join me on this educational adventure and unlock your full potential.
listing:
  - id: ay_22-23
    contents: ay_22-23.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/teaching/listing.ejs
  - id: ay_19-20
    contents: ay_19-20.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/teaching/listing.ejs
    
# title-block-banner: "#EE6A24"
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: Academic Year
---

## 2022–23

:::{#ay_22-23}
:::



## 2019–20

:::{#ay_19-20}
:::
